questions.context_sentence: Draw a happy face on the center of the plate.
questions.cn: 在盘子正中间画一张笑脸。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cen（看作cent，分/美分）+ ter -> 把硬币放在正中间。
questions.prompt: Draw a happy face on the ____ of the plate. (提示: (正)中间)

questions.context_sentence: Make a hole (洞) at the top of the plate.
questions.cn: 在盘子顶端打一个洞。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：at the top of...，表示“在……的顶部”。

questions.context_sentence: Put string through the hole.
questions.cn: 把绳子穿过这个洞。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：thr + ough，穿过树林（through the forest）。

questions.context_sentence: We must take off shoes when we get into our house.
questions.cn: 当我们进屋时，必须脱掉鞋子。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：take off脱下，反义词是put on穿上。
questions.prompt: We must ____ shoes when we get into our house. (提示: 脱下)

questions.context_sentence: Nobody wants to get disturbed(受干扰的) while they sleep well.
questions.cn: 没有人想在睡得正香时受到干扰。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：no（没有）+ body（人/身体）-> 没有人。

questions.context_sentence: Two robots cook different kinds of food;
questions.cn: 两个机器人烹饪不同种类的食物；
questions.hint: 联想记忆：kind作形容词时是“善良的”，作名词时是“种类”。

questions.context_sentence: one does the dishes;
questions.cn: 一个清洗餐具；
questions.hint: 短语记忆：do (做) + the dishes (盘子/餐具) -> 洗盘子，清洗餐具。

questions.context_sentence: Luckily, John is good at studying robots and he knows robots very well.
questions.cn: 幸运的是，约翰擅长研究机器人，而且他对机器人非常了解。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：be good at + doing sth. 表示“擅长做某事”。

questions.context_sentence: I think there will be a lot of robot-themed(机器人主题的) restaurants around the world in the future.
questions.cn: 我认为未来全世界会有很多机器人主题餐厅。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：around（周围）+ the world（世界）-> 环绕世界，即“全世界”。
questions.prompt: I think there will be a lot of robot-themed restaurants ____ in the future.

questions.context_sentence: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect(尊重) each other's personal space.
questions.cn: 他们喜欢花时间在一起，但他们也知道如何尊重彼此的个人空间。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：person（人）+ al（形容词后缀，……的）-> 个人的，私人的。

questions.context_sentence: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect(尊重) each other's personal space.
questions.cn: 他们喜欢花时间在一起，但他们也知道如何尊重彼此的个人空间。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sp + ace（王牌）-> 在太空中打王牌。
questions.prompt: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect each other's personal ____.

questions.context_sentence: Emma usually asks politely, "Would you like some?"
questions.cn: 艾玛通常会有礼貌地问：“你想来点吗？”
questions.hint: 联想记忆：polite（有礼貌的）+ ly（副词后缀）-> 礼貌地。

questions.context_sentence: But when there is too much plankton, it hurts other animals in the sea.
questions.cn: 但是当浮游生物过多时，它会危害海里的其他动物。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：hu + rt（看作run tired，跑累了）-> 跑累了容易受伤（hurt）。
questions.prompt: But when there is too much plankton, it ____ other animals in the sea. (提示: 危害;损害)

questions.context_sentence: This brings trouble for fishermen who grow mussels (贻贝).
questions.cn: 这给养殖贻贝的渔民带来了困难。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：tr（看作tree，树）+ ouble（看作double，双倍）-> 双倍的树木砍伐带来了“麻烦”。

questions.context_sentence: This brings trouble for fishermen who grow mussels (贻贝).
questions.cn: 这给养殖贻贝的渔民带来了困难。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：gr（看作green，绿色的）+ ow -> 绿色植物正在“生长”。
questions.prompt: This brings trouble for fishermen who ____ mussels. (提示: 种植)

questions.context_sentence: It takes oxygen(氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in.
questions.cn: 它从水中吸收氧气，并且不让足够的阳光射入。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：e + nough（读音像“拿夫”）-> 拿够了，表示“足够”。

questions.context_sentence: It takes oxygen(氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in.
questions.cn: 它从水中吸收氧气，并且不让足够的阳光射入。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sun（太阳）+ light（光）-> 阳光。
questions.prompt: It takes oxygen from the water and does not let enough ____ in.

questions.context_sentence: Now more than 80% of fishermen are having problems.
questions.cn: 现在超过80%的渔民都遇到了问题。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：more（更多）+ than（比）-> 比……更多，即“多于、超出”。

questions.context_sentence: Draw a happy face on the center of the plate.
questions.cn: 在盘子正中间画一张笑脸。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cen（看作cent，分/美分）+ ter -> 把硬币放在正中间。

questions.context_sentence: Put string through the hole.
questions.cn: 把绳子穿过这个洞。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：thr + ough，穿过树林（through the forest）。

questions.context_sentence: We must take off shoes when we get into our house.
questions.cn: 当我们进屋时，必须脱掉鞋子。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：take off脱下，反义词是put on穿上。

questions.context_sentence: Nobody wants to get disturbed(受干扰的) while they sleep well.
questions.cn: 没有人想在睡得正香时受到干扰。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：no（没有）+ body（人/身体）-> 没有人。
questions.prompt: ____ wants to get disturbed while they sleep well.

questions.context_sentence: one does the dishes;
questions.cn: 一个清洗餐具；
questions.hint: 短语记忆：do (做) + the dishes (盘子/餐具) -> 洗盘子，清洗餐具。

questions.context_sentence: I think there will be a lot of robot-themed(机器人主题的) restaurants around the world in the future.
questions.cn: 我认为未来全世界会有很多机器人主题餐厅。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：around（周围）+ the world（世界）-> 环绕世界，即“全世界”。

questions.context_sentence: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect(尊重) each other's personal space.
questions.cn: 他们喜欢花时间在一起，但他们也知道如何尊重彼此的个人空间。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：person（人）+ al（形容词后缀，……的）-> 个人的，私人的。

questions.context_sentence: They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect(尊重) each other's personal space.
questions.cn: 他们喜欢花时间在一起，但他们也知道如何尊重彼此的个人空间。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sp + ace（王牌）-> 在太空中打王牌。

questions.context_sentence: Emma usually asks politely, "Would you like some?"
questions.cn: 艾玛通常会有礼貌地问：“你想来点吗？”
questions.hint: 联想记忆：polite（有礼貌的）+ ly（副词后缀）-> 礼貌地。
questions.prompt: Emma usually asks ____, "Would you like some?"

questions.context_sentence: But when there is too much plankton, it hurts other animals in the sea.
questions.cn: 但是当浮游生物过多时，它会危害海里的其他动物。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：hu + rt（看作run tired，跑累了）-> 跑累了容易受伤（hurt）。
